queries.question: What type of requirement is common to all job postings?
queries.sql: SELECT Requirements.requirement_type  from Job_Postings_Requirements join Requirements on Job_Postings_Requirements.requirement_id = Requirements.id join Job_Postings on Job_Postings_Requirements.job_posting_id = Job_Postings.id   GROUP BY Job_Postings_Requirements.requirement_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Job_Postings_Requirements.job_posting_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Job_Postings)

queries.question: Show me the minimum requirements and their types every job posting has.
queries.sql: SELECT Requirements.requirement_type, Requirements.value  from Job_Postings_Requirements join Requirements on Job_Postings_Requirements.requirement_id = Requirements.id join Job_Postings on Job_Postings_Requirements.job_posting_id = Job_Postings.id   GROUP BY Job_Postings_Requirements.requirement_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Job_Postings_Requirements.job_posting_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Job_Postings)

queries.question: Show me the minimum requirements and their types every job posting has.
queries.sql: select job_postings.title , requirements.requirement_type , requirements.value from Job_Postings_Requirements join Requirements on Job_Postings_Requirements.requirement_id = Requirements.id join Job_Postings on Job_Postings_Requirements.job_posting_id = Job_Postings.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?requirement_type ?value WHERE {
  ?job_postings_requirements a :Job_Postings_Requirements .
  ?requirements a :Requirements .
  ?job_postings_requirements p:hasRequirements ?requirements .
  ?job_postings a :JobPostings .
  ?job_postings_requirements p:hasJob_Postings ?job_postings .
  ?job_postings p:title ?title .
  ?requirements p:requirement_type ?requirement_type .
  ?requirements p:value ?value .
}

queries.question: Give me the requirements for each job posting.
queries.sql: SELECT Requirements.value  from Job_Postings_Requirements join Requirements on Job_Postings_Requirements.requirement_id = Requirements.id join Job_Postings on Job_Postings_Requirements.job_posting_id = Job_Postings.id   GROUP BY Job_Postings_Requirements.requirement_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Job_Postings_Requirements.job_posting_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Job_Postings)

queries.question: For each job postings, provide the corresponding requirement type.
queries.sql: select job_postings.title , requirements.requirement_type from Job_Postings_Requirements join Requirements on Job_Postings_Requirements.requirement_id = Requirements.id join Job_Postings on Job_Postings_Requirements.job_posting_id = Job_Postings.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?requirement_type WHERE {
  ?job_postings_requirements a :Job_Postings_Requirements .
  ?requirements a :Requirements .
  ?job_postings_requirements p:hasRequirements ?requirements .
  ?job_postings a :JobPostings .
  ?job_postings_requirements p:hasJob_Postings ?job_postings .
  ?job_postings p:title ?title .
  ?requirements p:requirement_type ?requirement_type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What type of requirements do we have for each job posting?
Show me the minimum requirements and their types every job posting has.
Give me the requirements for each job posting.
